title: SWIM Refinement Sidecar v1
description: Schema for deterministic coarse->fine refinement of a SWIM coarse plan. Refinement splits within a parent unit; cross-parent dependencies are immutable; parent-wave topology must not be reordered. v1 ships profile=8k only.

coarse_plan.description: Path to the coarse *-execution-waves.json plan this refinement is derived from.

profile.description: Refinement profile name. v1 ships 8k only. Profile limits are documented in swim-refine-profile-8k.md.

plan_ref.description: Frame contract back to the coarse plan: must match the source plan's plan_version + plan_generation.

context_budget.description: Per-step context budget tier. Mandatory per the spec; v1 only defines 8k. Numeric limits live in swim-refine-profile-8k.md.

produces_marker.description: Free-form per-step produces marker (artifact name, schema, or task_status). Compiler emits the same shape for sibling rolls; runtime treats this as opaque.

argv.description: Canonical execution payload. Runner reads this directly.

parent_unit.description: The coarse unit ID this fine step belongs to (e.g. T2.1).

step_id.description: Fine step ID. Format: F{wave}_{parent_unit}_s{n}. F prefix distinguishes from coarse S{wave}_{...} step_ids.

files_scope.description: Files this step is allowed to read or write. Used by the compiler to enforce the profile's max_files limit.

depends_on.description: Fine-step dependencies. MUST share the same parent_unit (intra-parent only). Cross-parent dependencies are immutable and live in the coarse plan.

command_hint.description: Optional debug-only mirror of invoke.argv as a shell-quoted string. Runner MUST NOT execute this; invoke.argv is the canonical execution source.
